[[File:Weston_Warsheld.jpg|thumb|left|150px|[[Weston Warsheld]] with his MD-5 medical droid]]
The '''MD-5 medical droid''', also called the '''MD-5 general practitioner medical droid''', was a model of [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] and a part of the [[MD-series medical droid/Legends|MD-series]] that was manufactured by [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]]. It was slightly [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] in appearance. They were used as multipurpose medical [[Droid/Legends|droids]].

An MD-5 medical droid was used by the [[High Lord]] of [[House Calipsa]], [[Weston Warsheld]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. Another MD-5 unit by the name of [[MD-5|Emdee]] served ersatz [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Trioculus]] when he was used as a figurehead of the [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] coup attempt.

One MD-5 unit designated [[SH∑1-B]] assisted the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]] in looking after his wounded colleague [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] after the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] had escaped from the [[Sarlacc/Legends|Sarlacc]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

At least one of these droids served along with a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] medic team on [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]], on the then-headquarters of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:MD-5-alt.png|thumb|left|150px|Alternate image of a MD-5 General Practitioner droid]]
The appearance of Trioculus's Emdee vastly differs from other models of the MD-series. It also differed from the other images of an MD-5 from the ''[[Lords of the Expanse]]'' sourcebook.
